meta.title: Alea Farrel — Creative Web Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Alea Farrel, a creative web developer specializing in interactive 3D experiences, modern UI/UX, and full-stack development.

hero.name: Alea Farrel
hero.title: Creative Web Developer
hero.subtitle: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of design and technology.

about.heading: Passionate developer building the web of tomorrow.
about.bio_1: I'm a web developer with a deep love for creating interactive, high-performance digital experiences. I specialize in bridging the gap between stunning visual design and solid, scalable engineering.
about.bio_2: When I'm not pushing pixels or writing code, you'll find me exploring new creative technologies, contributing to open source, and collaborating with passionate teams to build meaningful products.

projects.heading: Selected Work
projects.subheading: A curated selection of projects that represent my passion for building things that matter.

items.title: Rapid Texter
items.description: A high-speed text generation tool built for productivity. Designed to help writers and developers scaffold content faster with intelligent templates and real-time preview.

items.title: 3D Portfolio Engine
items.description: The very website you're viewing now. Built with Astro.js, GSAP scroll canvas, and a bespoke 3D Neumorphism design system. A showcase of advanced front-end architecture.

items.title: Neomorphic UI Library
items.description: An open-source UI component library with a soft, tactile 3D Neumorphism aesthetic. Fully typed, accessible, and production-ready.

experience.heading: Where I've Grown
experience.subheading: The organizations and roles that have shaped my craft.

items.description: Active core member of AMCC, a leading student technology organization. Led web development initiatives, mentored junior members in modern front-end technologies, and contributed to the organization's digital presence and internal tooling.
highlights: Led a 5-member front-end team for the annual tech conference website
Introduced design system practices and Astro.js to the club's tech stack
Mentored 12+ junior members in React and TypeScript fundamentals

items.description: Delivering bespoke web solutions for clients across various industries — from e-commerce platforms to interactive portfolio sites and SaaS dashboards.
highlights: Delivered 10+ projects for clients in Indonesia and internationally
Achieved 100% client satisfaction with repeat business
Specialized in high-performance, animated web experiences

items.description: Pursuing a degree in Informatics Engineering, with a focus on software engineering, data structures, and human-computer interaction. Consistently in the top 10% of the class.

contact.heading: Let's Build Something Together
contact.subheading: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? My inbox is always open.

form.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
